note: spec 07 §4.1 -- the ONLY persistent network state: the list of lines that PHYSICALLY EXIST (id, config path, scenario as operated, in-service date, anchor source, calibration-kernel label if it has produced one). INITIALLY EMPTY beyond the implicit OCTA base -- the OC Streetcar has not opened as of this run's price base (2026). This file changes ONLY when reality changes; the hypothetical build ORDER is never persisted here (it lives, self-describing, in outputs/network_sequence.json, regenerable from committed configs + seed -- gate G6). Empty `lines` is the load-bearing gate-G1 state: cycle-1 candidate evaluations run against an empty network, so build_corridor's empty-network verbatim rule holds and the standalone committed results reproduce byte-identically.

schema.scenario: fold | retain -- the operator scenario as operated (spec 06 un-blending)
schema.kernel_label: calibration-kernel label if the line has produced one (spec 07 §6.1), else null
